pool.title: Pool
pool.description: An NFL futures pick em pool created by a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the pool.

code.description: The code required to join the pool.

creatorId.description: The UID of the user who created the pool.

creatorName.description: The display name of the creator.

results.description: The official results set by the pool creator/admin for grading.

picks.title: Picks
picks.description: The NFL futures picks submitted by a member of a pool.

userDisplayName.description: The display name of the picker.

userPhotoURL.description: The photo URL of the picker.

selections.description: Map of futures category IDs to selections.

updatedAt.description: When the picks were last updated.

/pools/{poolId}/picks/{userId}.description: User picks subcollection within a pool.
